name: platform-tools
description:
Android SDK Platform Tools is a complete suite of Command line utilities needed to manage Android devices. The commands included are:
  - adb
  - dmtracedump
  - e2fsdroid
  - etc1tool
  - fastboot
  - hprof-conv
  - make_f2fs
  - make_f2fs_casefold
  - mke2fs
  - sload_f2fs
  - sqlite3
